zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva de Venables於大約1367年出生在英國爾金德頓時，她的父親Hugh de Venables38歲，母親Margery Cotton33歲。她於大約1387年與Thomas de Fouleshurst在英國爾奧維 奧福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1416年享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva de Venables于大约1367年出生在英国爾金德頓时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables38岁，母亲Margery Cotton33岁。她于大约1387年与Thomas de Fouleshurst在英国爾奧維 奧福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1416年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eva de Venables was born about 1367, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 38 and her mother, Margery Cotton, was 33. She married Thomas de Fouleshurst about 1387, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1416, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva de Venables est née environ 1367, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margery Cotton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Fouleshurst environ 1387, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1416, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva de Venables um 1367 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 38 und ihre Mutter Margery Cotton 33. Sie hat um 1387 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England Thomas de Fouleshurst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1416 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva de Venables è nata il circa 1367 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margery Cotton, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Fouleshurst circa 1387, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1416, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Venablesが約1367年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは38歳，母Margery Cottonは33歳であった。約1387年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーでThomas de Fouleshurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1416年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Venables(이)가 대략 1367년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Cotton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1387년 영국 체실르 버 프오버에서 Thomas de Fouleshurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas de Fouleshurst aproximadamente 1387, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1416, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva de Venables родилась около 1367 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Cotton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Fouleshurst около 1387 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1416 г. в возрасте 50 лет.
